title: Dekton 250PC Cable Tie Set - 2.5MM X 150MM White | Heavy Duty Industrial Strength | High Temperature Resistant | Self-Locking Teeth | Ideal for Cables, Piping, Gardening & Wires | Indoor & Outdoor Use
features: Heavy Duty Industrial Strength: Crafted from 100% industrial-grade material, these cable ties offer exceptional durability and strength. Designed to withstand high temperatures, they are perfect for demanding environments, ensuring reliable performance whether you're organizing cables or securing piping.

Versatile Use for Various Applications: Ideal for tidying cables, organizing electrical wires, PC and laptop cords, and even gardening tasks. This set is versatile enough for both interior and exterior use, making it a practical solution for a wide range of organizing needs.

High Tensile Strength & Flexibility: Made from high tensile strength material, these cable ties provide a secure hold and flexibility for easy application. Their robust design ensures they can handle heavy-duty tasks without breaking, while still being adaptable to various uses.

Self-Locking Teeth for Secure Organization: The self-locking teeth on each cable tie allow for a tight, secure grip on any bundle of cables or wires. This feature ensures that your organization remains intact and prevents any accidental loosening, making your setup cleaner and more efficient.

Extensive Quantity for All Your Needs: This cable tie set provides a large quantity of ties to meet all your organizing requirements. With an ample supply, you can tackle a variety of tasks, from cable management to securing items, ensuring your workspace remains tidy and efficient. Perfect for both home and professional use.
description: From the manufacturer DT70420 250PC 2.5MM X 150MM WHITE CABLE TIES Heavy duty made from 100% industrial strength with high temperature resistance. Suitable for tidying cables, piping gardening, organising electrical wires, pc laptop cords, and many other uses. High tensile strength and flexible material - ideal for interior use. Self-locking teeth allows you to securely organise any group of cables or wires. Available in a wide range of different sizes and quantities. ADVANCED FEATURES WORKING TEMPERATURE Working temperature -45ºC - 85ºC. MINIMUM TENSILE STRENGTH Minimum tensile strength 8kg/18lb. BUNDLE DIAMETER Bundle diameter 35mm (max). AVAILABLE IN VARIETY OF SIZES Available in a wide variety of sizes, quantities and colours.
